overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dark forest path during a stormy night. The character traverses through dense pine forests with atmospheric fog and limited visibility, transitioning from rocky terrain to denser woodland areas with occasional structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with pine trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with sword on back, passing rocky terrain on the left

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation lining the left side of the path
broken wooden fence pieces and debris scattered on the right side
dense tall evergreen trees forming the forest canopy
dark storm clouds visible through gaps in the tree canopy
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of grass
snow-capped mountain visible in the distance between the trees

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a forest trail with rocky outcrops on the left and scattered wooden debris on the right. The stormy night sky is partially visible overhead between the tall pine trees, with a distant snow-capped mountain appearing in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with small clearing

events.description: small wooden tent structure comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, passing a small wooden structure on the right

entered.detail: small wooden shelter or tent visible among the trees on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path continues through denser forest with tall pines on both sides. A small wooden tent structure appears on the right side of the path before being left behind. The rocky terrain and initial debris fade from view as the forest thickens.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest with thick canopy cover

events.description: forest becomes significantly darker as tree canopy thickens and blocks remaining sky light

agents.ego_description: walking through the darkest section of the forest with limited visibility

segments.scene_description: The forest becomes very dark and enclosed as the tree canopy blocks most of the remaining light. The path continues through dense pines with minimal sky visibility, creating a sheltered, shadowy environment.

events.description: wooden fence railing appears on the right side marking path boundary

agents.ego_description: approaching a wooden fence structure while continuing along the forest trail

entered.detail: wooden fence posts and rails lining the right side of the path
stormy sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly, allowing glimpses of the stormy sky through the canopy overhead. A wooden fence railing appears on the right side of the path, marking the boundary as the trail continues through the dense pines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy forest trail that transitions from an open, rocky landscape into a dense, claustrophobic woodland. It begins with Geralt walking past rocky outcrops and wooden debris under a sky that reveals a distant snow-capped mountain. As the path pushes deeper into the forest, the rocky terrain fades away and the camera passes a small wooden tent before the pine trees thicken on both sides. The scene then shifts into a dark and enclosed environment where the heavy canopy blocks out the light, creating a sheltered, shadowy tunnel of pines. Finally, the forest opens slightly to reveal glimpses of the stormy sky once more as the camera follows the trail past a wooden fence railing.
